title: The Music of Zimmer vs Williams
full_description: This thrilling concert features music from the most iconic films, pitting the epic soundscapes of Zimmer against the timeless melodies of Williams. Unforgettable music from Jurassic Park, Star Wars, the Harry Potter films, E.T., Gladiator, The Adventures of Tintin and War Horse — performed live by a 70-piece orchestra.
ai_summary: A live orchestral concert pitting Hans Zimmer's cinematic soundscapes against John Williams's melodic scores — Gladiator, Jurassic Park, Star Wars, Harry Potter and more, performed by a 70-piece orchestra.

extension.notes_on_performance: Film scores — Star Wars, Pirates of the Caribbean, Jurassic Park, E.T., Harry Potter, Batman, The Dark Knight, Inception and more. Presented by Raymond Gubbay Limited.
